questionHtml:
HindIII is an endonuclease that recognizes the sequence A A G C T T, cutting between the two adenines.

Into how many DNA fragments would the strand shown be cut by HindIII?

A. 2

B. 3

C. 4

D. 5

meta.title: HindIII is an endonuclease that recognizes the sequence A A G C T T, cutting between the two adenines. Into how many DNA fragments would the strand shown be cut by HindIII? A. 2 B.
